focus: regression evidence: tests and scope boundaries

findingDetails.title: Concurrent refreshes can lose a generation/policy update
findingDetails.description: Refresh concurrency remains untested and unsynchronized.

findingDetails.title: Completion status conflicts with required packet gates

noveltyJustification: Regression review confirms existing evidence and the stale SD-015 follow-up; no new finding.
